## Checklist
- [ ] Linked issue exists and scope matches
- [ ] Reused/extended existing code where appropriate
- [ ] New abstractions/files justified
- [ ] Duplicate/obsolete code removed or explicitly tracked
- [ ] Tests added/updated (or justified)
- [ ] Validation evidence attached
- [ ] Negative/error-path behavior validated when material
- [ ] Docs updated or justified
- [ ] Rollout/rollback documented where relevant
- [ ] No pseudo code / fake production logic / placeholder runtime logic
- [ ] No orphaned or dead non-test code introduced
- [ ] Greptile comments dispositioned and resolved
- [ ] Follow-up issues created where needed
- [ ] Context classification declared and redaction noted
